summary: Replayed ADR 0306 from the latest `origin/main` lineage on `codex/ws-0306-mainline-v2`, landed the repo-managed Checkov IaC policy gate across the shared validation and build-server automation surfaces, and verified the settled branch end to end. The branch-local proof now includes targeted pytest, direct offline Checkov scanning, `check-build-server`, `remote-validate`, `pre-push-gate`, private Gitea branch validation, and repo-managed recovery of the host proxy, Gitea runtime, and Gitea runner path after the hosted control-plane listener drifted offline.

verification.observed: The settled branch passed `python3 -m py_compile scripts/iac_policy_scan.py config/checkov/checks/terraform/lv3_proxmox_checks.py`, `bash -n scripts/remote_exec.sh`, and the targeted pytest bundle with `58 passed in 309.49s` across the Checkov wrapper, lane selection, validation gate, runner contracts, remote execution, and validate-repo cache surfaces.

verification.check: Direct Checkov and build-server validation path
verification.observed: The branch passed the direct offline scan via `uv run --with checkov==3.2.469 --with pyyaml python3 scripts/iac_policy_scan.py` with `0 error, 2 warning, 876 note, 0 suppressed`, `make check-build-server`, `make remote-validate`, and `make pre-push-gate` on the settled `0.177.115` tree.

verification.check: Hosted branch validation on the private Gitea snapshot
verification.observed: After publishing the branch into the private repo, `validate.yml` run `177` / job `234` concluded `success` on `codex/ws-0306-mainline-v2`.

Host evidence first captured the Gitea proxy serving connection refusals while `10.10.10.20:3003` was down. The repo-managed `playbooks/gitea.yml` runtime replay restored the private Gitea listener and host proxy path, and the runner replay reasserted the `lv3-gitea-runner` container on `docker-build-lv3` before both plays hit the shared non-blocking SBOM tail.

notes: This branch-local receipt preserves the settled live replay from the isolated worktree before the protected canonical-truth surfaces were refreshed for merge to `main`.
The private Gitea repository is an internal hosted-verification snapshot, so this receipt records the branch-local hosted proof separately from the later exact-main private-main replay.
